units.source_text: 1 資產負債表內持作出售⽤途資產之中，9,000萬美元（2024年：3,000萬美元）出售⽤途業務組合未分配減值虧損及2.6億美元（2024年：9.2億美元）非⾦融資產
units.translation_target_text: 1 Among the assets held for sale on the balance sheet, US$90 million (2024: US$30 million) of unallocated impairment losses on the business portfolio for sale and US$260 million (2024: US$920 million) of non-financial assets (9, 3,)
units.translation_en: 1 Among the assets held for sale on the balance sheet, US$90 million (2024: US$30 million) of unallocated impairment losses on the business portfolio for sale and US$260 million (2024: US$920 million) of non-financial assets (9, 3,)

units.source_text: 2 資產負債表內持作出售⽤途業務組合之負債之中，總額50億美元（2024年：218.3億美元）非⾦融負債列入上表的非⾦融負債。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Among the liabilities of the business portfolio held for sale on the balance sheet, non-financial liabilities totaling USD 5 billion (2024: USD 21.83 billion) are included in the non-financial liabilities in the table above. (218)
